title: Sunfur Edit - Shader Friendly
description: A Sunfur Edit texturepack variant without custom sky elements. Use this if you or your shader doesn't like the custom sky.
body:
A vanilla-like texturepack featuring dark-mode, 3D details for blocks and some small texture tweaks like slightly lower grass to make the game look more dynamic.

_Requires Optifine or mods with similar resourcepack support to work properly._

This is a variant of the **Sunfur Edit** texturepack. It has no custom sky, so if you don't like the full versions custom sky or it looks bad in combination with the shader you are using, this is the right variant for you.

## [Available Sunfur Edit Variants](https://modrinth.com/collection/YYDST57h)
### Overview:
|**[Sunfur Edit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sunfur-edit):**|Custom Sky|Custom 3d Models|Fancy Dark UI|
|---------------------|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------|
| **[Sunfur Edit - low:](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sunfur-edit-low)**|Only Sun & Moon|No custom models|Fancy Dark UI|
| **[Shader Friendly:](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sunfur-edit-shader-friendly)**|No Custom Sky|Custom 3d Models|Fancy Dark UI|

The low version **doesn't require Optifine**. It is also strongly optimised for performance and file size.

Please note that **minecraft versions newer than 1.20.1 are not supported** and will cause some textures to behave different as intended.
